headline: Six-insurer competitive process at Westpac, shortlisted to two. Allianz selected as partner.
evidence: Ran six-month competitive process at Westpac, shortlisting six insurers to two. Allianz selected as strategic alliance partner. Managed Suncorp/Promina post-merger platform integration (best-of-both approach). Led CBA portfolio transition to Hollard including separation of a highly integrated business.
